description: Composition Black round neck T-shirt made of 40% polyester and 60% cotton, engineered with Dri-Fit technology, has short sleeves and nike swoosh printed on the left chest Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash cold with like colours Do not dry clean or bleach Tumble dry low Warm iron Crafted from blended fabric, this T-shirt from nike offers exemplary dry comfort, making it a great everyday choice for your healthy runs and casual days. Team this tee with jeans and running shoes for a sporty look.
